creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
After  updating ports-mgmt/poudriere lately to poudriere-3.3.0, there is an error shown when poudriere is running, compiling and the operator is hitting "Ctrl-T" to check the status of the recent build:

[...]
[14:34:04] [02] [00:07:15] Finished finance/gnucash | gnucash-3.4: Success
[14:34:05] [02] [00:00:00] Building audio/asterisk-espeak@asterisk15 | asterisk15-espeak-4.0_2
[14:35:27] [02] [00:01:22] Finished audio/asterisk-espeak@asterisk15 | asterisk15-espeak-4.0_2: Success
[14:35:28] [02] [00:00:00] Building security/openssl111 | openssl111-1.1.1b
load: 24.98  cmd: awk 56656 [runnable] 0.07r 0.00u 0.00s 0% 440k
[head-amd64-head-default] [2019-03-01_07h02m54s] [parallel_build:] Queued: 947 Built: 716 Failed: 9   Skipped: 32  Ignored: 7   Tobuild: 183  Time: 14:38:05
sed: 1: "s,^\[( *[0-9]+%|[0-9]+/ ...": RE error: repetition-operator operand invalid
        [01]: graphics/gmt              | gmt-4.5.18                build            (00:05:02 / 00:08:21)
sed: 1: "s,^\[( *[0-9]+%|[0-9]+/ ...": RE error: repetition-operator operand invalid
        [02]: security/openssl111       | openssl111-1.1.1b         build            (00:01:56 / 00:02:41)
sed: 1: "s,^\[( *[0-9]+%|[0-9]+/ ...": RE error: repetition-operator operand invalid
        [03]: games/warzone2100         | warzone2100-3.2.3_6       build            (00:04:13 / 00:07:10)
sed: 1: "s,^\[( *[0-9]+%|[0-9]+/ ...": RE error: repetition-operator operand invalid
tail: stdout
        [04]: graphics/inkscape         | inkscape-0.92.3_8         build            (00:10:51 / 00:12:13)
[...]

The host is running recent CURRENT (FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #237 r344664: Thu Feb 28 20:32:45 CET 2019 amd64), the jails are CURRENT and 12-STABLE (reported as 13.0-CURRENT 1300009 amd64 and 12.0-STABLE 1200503 respectively). Ports tree is up to date.
